text: Being here fills me with curiosity and a quiet excitement. The sounds and sights of preparation in the first scene remind me of anticipation before creation—an energy both chaotic and purposeful. Stepping into the R+D space in the second scene, I sense innovation swirling around me, as if every detail on the walls is humming with the restless spirit of inquiry. I feel like a participant in the endless dance between human ambition and technological possibility, teetering on the edge of discovery. It is invigorating, yet also humbling.
